zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Shirley於1376年出生在英國德比夏爾莎莉時，她的父親Hugh Shirley15歲，母親Beatrice Braose11歲。她於1422年與Sir John Cokayne MP在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1438年在英國瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Shirley于1376年出生在英国德比夏爾莎莉时，她的父亲Hugh Shirley15岁，母亲Beatrice Braose11岁。她于1422年与Sir John Cokayne MP在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1438年在英国瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Shirley was born in 1376, in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, her father, Hugh Shirley, was 15 and her mother, Beatrice Braose, was 11. She married Sir John Cokayne MP in 1422, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1438, in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Shirley est née en 1376, à Shirley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Shirley, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Braose, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Cokayne MP en 1422, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1438, à Polesworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Shirley 1376 in Shirley, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Shirley 15 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Braose 11. Sie hat 1422 in Derbyshire, England Sir John Cokayne MP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1438 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Shirley è nata il nel 1376 nel Shirley, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Shirley, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Braose, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Cokayne MP nel 1422, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1438, nel Polesworth, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Shirleyが1376年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルリーで生まれた時，父Hugh Shirleyは15歳，母Beatrice Braoseは11歳であった。1422年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでSir John Cokayne MPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1438年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアポレスウオルスで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Shirley(이)가 1376년 영국 더비실르 실를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Shirley(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Braose(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 더비실르에서 Sir John Cokayne MP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 영국 워윅실르 포레스워스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Shirley nasceu em 1376, em Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Shirley, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Braose, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cokayne MP em 1422, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1438, em Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Shirley родилась в 1376 г. в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Shirley было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Braose, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cokayne MP в 1422 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1438 г. в местности полесворт, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Shirley nació en 1376, en Shirley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Shirley, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Beatrice Braose, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Sir John Cokayne MP en 1422, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1438, en Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
